name: Simuaction -シミュアクション-
short_description: ・Blue troops are allies, red troops are enemies. ・In the hexagonal map, friendly units are thrown against enemy units, and combat ensues. ・The battle is a side view action, shoot, shoot, slash. ・You can win by destroying all the enemy units! ・Use turrets and laser turrets to attack unilaterally!
detailed_description:
“Simuaction -シミュアクション-” is an action game set in a distant future. The goal is to control the blue army and annihilate the red army.

Overview: There are three modes, but the combat aspect remains an action game, with the objective of wiping out the red army.

1.Arcade Mode:
Clear stages with different enemy formations in sequence.
Use the funds earned from clearing stages to purchase units and strengthen your own army.
Unlock the Simulation Mode after clearing all stages.
2.Simulation Mode:
Clear stages with predetermined blue army and enemy formations in any order.
Place blue army units on hex-based maps adjacent to red army units for combat.
Unlock the Free Battle Mode after clearing all stages.
3.Free Battle Mode:
Customize your own blue army and enemy formations for enjoyable battles.
Set the types and numbers of units, or leave it to random selection.

Features:
Battles can involve up to 99 units vs. 99 units.
Ensuring active participation of your own army in combat is crucial.
